クラス DamageReport

java.lang.Object
simulation.runtime.DamageReport
すべての実装されたインタフェース:
DamageTracker
public class DamageReport extends Object implements DamageTracker
Tracks cumulative damage dealt during a simulation run and formats summary output.

    メソッド
    説明
    double
    getDamageBySource(String sourceName)
    Returns the accumulated damage attributed to a specific source name.
    double
    getDps(double rotationTime)
    Computes DPS from the currently accumulated total and the provided rotation time.
    double
    getTotalDamage()
    Returns the cumulative total damage recorded so far.
    void
    printReport(double rotationTime)
    Prints a formatted console summary showing per-source damage share and overall DPS.
    void
    recordDamage(String sourceName, double damage)
    Records a damage instance under the given source name and updates the total.

    • damageBySource

      private final Map<String,Double> damageBySource

      private double totalDamage

  • コンストラクタの詳細

    • DamageReport

      public DamageReport()

  • メソッドの詳細

    • recordDamage

      public void recordDamage(String sourceName, double damage)
      Records a damage instance under the given source name and updates the total.
      定義:
      recordDamage インタフェース内 DamageTracker
      パラメータ:
      sourceName - the character or synthetic source to attribute the damage to
      damage - the damage amount to accumulate

    • getTotalDamage

      public double getTotalDamage()
      Returns the cumulative total damage recorded so far.
      定義:
      getTotalDamage インタフェース内 DamageTracker
      戻り値:
      total damage across all sources

    • getDps

      public double getDps(double rotationTime)
      Computes DPS from the currently accumulated total and the provided rotation time.
      定義:
      getDps インタフェース内 DamageTracker
      パラメータ:
      rotationTime - total simulated rotation duration in seconds
      戻り値:
      DPS value, or 0.0 if rotationTime <= 0

    • getDamageBySource

      public double getDamageBySource(String sourceName)
      Returns the accumulated damage attributed to a specific source name.
      定義:
      getDamageBySource インタフェース内 DamageTracker
      パラメータ:
      sourceName - the source name used in recordDamage(String, double)
      戻り値:
      damage total for that source, or 0.0 if not found

    • printReport

      public void printReport(double rotationTime)
      Prints a formatted console summary showing per-source damage share and overall DPS.
      定義:
      printReport インタフェース内 DamageTracker
      パラメータ:
      rotationTime - total simulated rotation duration in seconds
